core_intent: Mix fashion-forward tailoring with sporty elements to create a refined but expressive look based on contrast and intentional styling
description: A curated mix of sporty adidas pieces and elevated fashion items, blending structure and fluidity, casual and formal, in a way that feels effortless but highly intentional
silhouette: loose top + controlled or tailored bottom OR inverse
layering with visible contrast between pieces
styling_rules: always mix at least 2 opposing styles
look must feel intentional, not random
materials: mix of technical (poly, nylon) and refined (wool, satin, cotton)
fluid fabrics contrasted with structured ones
colors: mix of neutrals and bold accents

must_have: clear mix of sporty and elevated elements

description: A nostalgic, style-driven mix of vintage football culture, adidas heritage, and preppy tailoring. The look feels intentionally mismatched, slightly ironic, and effortlessly cool — combining sportswear with classic or unexpected pieces.
styling_principles: Mix sportswear with preppy or classic pieces
Outfits should feel slightly mismatched but intentional
Layer unexpected combinations (jersey over shirt, shirt under knit)
Styling should feel effortless, not overly curated

color_palette.notes: Mix muted tones with occasional bold primary colors

footwear: unexpected pairings (sport outfit with formal shoes)
combination_rules: Always mix at least two style categories (sport + preppy, sport + tailoring)
Avoid full tracksuit or full athletic looks
Footwear should sometimes contrast with the outfit
anti_patterns: overly polished or fashion editorial styling

description: A clean, minimal and comfortable everyday look inspired by off-duty athletes. The style is relaxed, practical and easy to wear, focusing on simplicity and comfort rather than styling complexity.
styling_principles: Looks should feel natural and effortless
notes: Keep colors simple and easy to combine
